title: Windows temp OpenAPI filepath is not relative
rationale: Windows can return an absolute path when relativizing an OpenAPI spec from a different drive than the new workspace; `fern init` now rejects that case with a config error instead of tripping the relative-path invariant.
fixSummary: Throw a config error when cross-drive OpenAPI specs cannot be expressed relative to the new workspace.
problemSignature: OpenAPI or workspace path conversion received an absolute path where a relative path was required; path boundary bug until fixed.
